## Summary

<!-- Describe what this pull request changes and why. One paragraph is enough. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat — new user-facing feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — build, config, tooling, dependency update
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] data — dataset addition or transformation
- [ ] ai — prompt, model, or evaluation change

## Related ADR or Issue

<!-- Link the ADR or issue that authorised this change. -->

ADR:
Issue:

## Self-Review Checklist

- [ ] Changes are limited to the stated scope of this task.
- [ ] No business logic in routes, Composables, or data classes.
- [ ] All new public functions and classes have docstrings.
- [ ] Tests cover the new behaviour, including edge cases.
- [ ] No hardcoded values that belong in config or string resources.
- [ ] Error cases return structured, user-readable responses.
- [ ] No new dependencies without explanation in this description.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or API keys in any file.
- [ ] ADR written if this change makes an architectural decision.
- [ ] Documentation updated if architecture or behaviour changed.
